title: thelypteris solsonica
intro: Thelypteris solsonica, also known as the Solsón fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. The Solsón fern is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Solsón fern are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
